Pharmacy AI

Safety System

System Online
Step 9 of 10

AI Saves Everything to an Audit Log

The AI saves every single action to an audit log that cannot be changed or deleted.

Immutable Audit Log

AUDIT_LOG_SECURE.logREAD-ONLY
[09:15:22]
Pharmacist logged in- ID: PANS2024
[09:15:45]
Prescription received- Patient: Mrs. Folake E. | Drug: Amlodipine 10mg
[09:16:05]
Interaction detected- Amlodipine + Simvastatin: High risk
[09:16:45]
Prescriber updated prescription- Dose adjusted after consultation
[09:17:30]
Cascade check- No cough confirmed by prescriber
[09:19:15]
Scan failed- Wrong strength (5mg instead of 10mg)
[09:19:30]
Scan success- Verified: Amlodipine 10mg
[09:20:30]
Label generated- Auto-printed for Amlodipine 10mg
[09:21:00]
Dispensing complete- All safety checks passed
All timestamps are server-synchronized and cryptographically signed.
Go BackFinish

What the AI is doing

Creating a permanent, tamper-proof record for hospital audits, regulatory compliance, and safety investigations. Every action is timestamped and traceable.
